text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #4)

Only: CFLAGS= -O2 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native

(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #5)

It builds fine, no errors

(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #6)

Non standart options:
BACKUP=bopt
ALWAYS_SCRUB_DISTFILES=dopt
